mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_exam_record WHERE AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_exam_record WHERE AND exam_id = #{examId}
mapper.update: UPDATE t_exam_record SET status = #{status}, score = #{score}, submit_time = #{submitTime}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} AND
mapper.select: SELECT er.score, er.submit_time AS submitTime, u.real_name AS studentName, e.title AS examTitle FROM t_exam_record er INNER JOIN t_user u ON er.user_id = u.id INNER JOIN t_exam e ON er.exam_id = e.id WHERE er.is_deleted = 0 AND er.status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY er.submit_time DESC LIMIT 50
